repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: The current repair targets ca6k_01114, a new torch#1 operator. The chosen memories address common failure patterns across many ca6k operators: 193e1ac4 covers redefinition of REG_OP in op_proto.h (a frequent build error), 84bb2c98 addresses TilingData setter misuse (common in TilingFunc compilation errors), b0fabc43 handles Shape/StorageShape conversion failures (frequent in InferShape/TilingFunc), and 36fd506b guides correct txt bundle generation (preventing missing OpDef or REG_OP). These four together provide diverse, complementary hints likely to match the current repair context.
